mapper.sql: id, provider, match_scope, product_code, product_name, product_detail, commodity_code, billing_item_code, billing_item, decision, note, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM billing_item_rule ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO billing_item_rule (provider, match_scope, product_code, product_name, product_detail, commodity_code, billing_item_code, billing_item, decision, note) VALUES (#{provider}, #{matchScope}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productDetail}, #{commodityCode}, #{billingItemCode}, #{billingItem}, #{decision}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_item_rule SET provider = #{provider}, match_scope = #{matchScope}, product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, product_detail = #{productDetail}, commodity_code = #{commodityCode}, billing_item_code = #{billingItemCode}, billing_item = #{billingItem}, decision = #{decision}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
